hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit[[:space:]]+(-[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*push\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"git push requires explicit user confirmation (repo policy — see CLAUDE.md)"}}'; fi
